LSE-MS6-MSMATH6-HMX-IMR-01 | MS Math: Grade 6 | Dependent and Independent Variables | Haunted Manuscript Exchange | Immigrant & Refugee Journeys

The Haunted Manuscript

Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:

Why are the girl and boy trying to figure out what the notebook means?

Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.

SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about why the boy asks his question, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what he says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what he wants to understand.
